name: Space Thugs
short_description: Space Thugs, join the space thugs as they got on an adventure across the universe. Includes strip clubs.
detailed_description:
Story Mode: Space Thugs is an engaging action adventure game that combines side scrolling and top down gameplay elements. The game features a captivating story following Thug T and Thug Money across four chapters with more to come, each with its own distinct setting and challenges. Players must navigate through 12 diverse levels in the four chapters, facing different space gangsters and obstacles. In addition to the main story mode there is another mode. Target mode, get a random target you need to take out and get a rating from the Boss and another one called Contract Mode.

Target Mode

Get a random target and take him out, then get a rating from the boss.

Contract Mode 

Find certain space ships across an open world and take out as many as you can with out dying to the dangers of the universe, get the best score.
